_ruleNotes.COR001: Inline objects OK — K8s composite props are simple and readable inline
_ruleNotes.COR004: Unused exports expected — resources are consumed by serializers, not same-file refs
_ruleNotes.COR009: File count limit too strict for multi-resource cluster configs
_ruleNotes.COR013: Mixed resource/config acceptable — cluster configs are tightly coupled to their resources
_ruleNotes.EVL001: Dynamic env var lookups required for project ID and GSA emails
_ruleNotes.EVL004: Spread from shared config (CRDB_CLUSTER) is safe and traceable
_ruleNotes.WGC002: Hardcoded GCP region intentional — fixed deployment region
_ruleNotes.WK8001: Hardcoded K8s namespace intentional — each region has a dedicated namespace
